## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance
- [ ] CI / tooling change

## Testing Performed

List commands you ran and results:

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run docs:build` (if docs changed)

## Documentation

- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
- [ ] No documentation changes were required

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] This PR introduces a breaking change
- [ ] This PR does not introduce a breaking change

If breaking, describe migration steps:

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are focused and minimal
- [ ] Sensitive values are not included in code, docs, or logs
- [ ] Issue templates and labels are used appropriately
- [ ] Device support requests and bug fixes are clearly separated
